# BEYONDVYU — Turn happy customers into authentic Google reviews

> BEYONDVYU helps local businesses collect more authentic Google reviews with QR codes and an AI assistant that jogs your customers' memory — fully compliant with Google and FTC policy.

## Product

BEYONDVYU is a SaaS platform for local businesses to collect authentic Google reviews. Key features:
- QR code-based review collection
- AI-powered sentiment analysis
- WhatsApp/email review request templates
- Weekly automated insights delivery
- Multi-location support
- FTC and Google policy compliant
- No review gating — all customers see same Google review link
- No incentivized reviews
- No writing reviews on behalf of customers

## Pricing

### Free Plan
- Price: Free
- Includes: QR code generation, basic analytics, up to 50 feedback submissions/month

### Starter Plan
- Price: ₹499/month or ₹4,990/year
- 1 business, 500 AI calls/mo, AI reply drafting, Review insights, SMS & email requests, Priority support

### Growth Plan (Most Popular)
- Price: ₹799/month or ₹7,990/year
- 1 business, 2000 AI calls/mo, Everything in Starter, Google Business Profile sync, Team roles, Dedicated support

## How it works

1. **Scan the QR code** — Place the QR code at the front desk, on receipts, or send via text. One tap opens a fast, mobile-first feedback flow.

2. **Rate their experience** — Every customer sees the same path. No gating — everyone can share their honest experience and rate the business.

3. **Share details in their language** — Customers choose their preferred language and answer specific questions based on their rating. AI generates talking points to help them write authentic Google reviews.

4. **AI generates the review draft** — Based on customer feedback, AI creates a natural review draft. Customers review, edit, and own every word before posting to Google.

5. **Get AI-powered business insights** — Every review feeds into the dashboard. AI analyzes sentiment, tracks trends, finds top praises and complaints — delivered as weekly reports to WhatsApp.

6. **Stay fully compliant** — No gating, no templated reviews, no staff name prompts. Every review is authentic and policy-safe with Google and FTC.

## Compliance

- No incentivized reviews
- No writing reviews on behalf of customers
- No review gating
- Full FTC endorsement guidelines compliance
- Google review policy compliance
- RBI e-Mandate compliant for Indian subscriptions
